status: Cycle 2 Build Week Day 2 — Mobile Install Moment + Welcome Onramp shipped: install trigger moved from session-count to 3-levels-completed; welcome toast arc on L1/L2/L3 first solves ('🎉 First circuit lit!' / '⚡ Two down — flowing!' / '🚀 You're flowing — install for offline + notifications'); branded install modal with offline/daily/1-tap benefits and 3-button choice (Install / Maybe Later 14d / No Thanks 90d); iOS Safari fallback modal with Add-to-Home-Screen steps; standalone-mode suppression via display-mode + navigator.standalone; Settings → 📲 Install App entry that force-shows; onboarding Step 1/3, 2/3, 3/3 chips on L1–L3 cards while completed-count<3; streak chip suppressed on truly fresh profiles (no completed levels). Cache bust ?v=1778774400, sw v47. CDP verification: cold-start (chips visible, no streak, no modal); L1→L2→L3 toast arc fires; install modal opens 1.8s after L3; Maybe Later → 14d snooze respected; force-from-settings reopens; No Thanks → 90d snooze; standalone hides modal but force still works; iOS UA → iOS modal opens. 0 console errors across all paths.
lastRunNote: Cycle 2 Build Week Day 2 complete. Mobile install onramp + welcome arc shipped per cycle-2-build.md item 2/5.
phase3Focus: Fix replayability, deepen engagement, smooth difficulty curve
